nasb.text: But Jesus answered and said, “Stop! No more of this.” And He touched his ear and healed him.

esv.text: But Jesus said, “No more of this!” And he touched his ear and healed him.

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“由他們吧！”就摸那人的耳朵，醫好了他。

ccb.text: 耶稣却说：“住手！够了！”于是祂摸那奴仆的耳朵，治好了他，

csbs.text: 耶稣应声说：“住手，到此为止！”然后摸一下那个人的耳朵，使他痊愈了。
